mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, id_card_no, passenger_type, phone, created_at, updated_at FROM passenger WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO passenger(user_id, name, id_card_no, passenger_type, phone) VALUES(#{userId}, #{name}, #{idCardNo}, #{passengerType}, #{phone})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM order_passenger WHERE passenger_id = #{id}
